title: Legion
description: Enhances the base Minecraft tooltips to show potion attributes, armor & trim previews and more!
body:
Legion

# 🤔 What is Legion? Legion is a mod enhancing the base Minecraft tooltips by displaying more information and in a better way than how Mojang does it. # 💡 Features ## 🧙‍♀️ Advanced potion tooltips Not only displaying the potion effects in a much prettier way, but also providing more information on the stat changes (strength gives attack damage, haste attack speed, etc.): ![Potions now display the statistics and effects in a way that is easier on the eyes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc7dd179521215ea94e735b33483a5c7628436a6_0.webp)  ![Potions now display the statistics and effects in a way that is easier on the eyes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9edf84f98b04bd664d93962c85c7350e83657d5d_0.webp) ## ⚔️ Armor & Trim Preview Hovering over a piece of equipment, a shield or a trim now reveals how it would look on the player in a preview box: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a869d3236d8b49b54f9643d0660908f1fa8b0e60_0.webp)  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7c1a49abbf6470a1fbe57dec06eadf5aa8bb55_0.webp) The armor trim preview even displays random variation of that trim (random material, random equipment) to properly show its pattern! ## ⏰ Item Cooldowns Legion also shows for how long an item is on cooldown! ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ffa55f12b2c3c9d4603e11686d377997909250_0.webp) # ❓ Q&A
Can I use this in my modpack? Yes.
I have an issue. Where can I report it? Issues can be reported in the help channel of the Discord.
Can you port this to Forge/Neoforge/Quilt? No. I only make mods for Fabric and won't port them for other mod loaders. If you want to make a branch of Legion for another loader, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
Can you backport the mod to version `x.xx`? No. I make mods for the latest version of the game and will not backport them. Similarly to Question 1, if you want to make a branch of Legion for another version of the game, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
